name: Functional - /query endpoint returns fallback when documents missing
description: Ensures /query endpoint returns fallback response and error message when required documents are not found in the knowledge base.
input: POST request to /query endpoint with knowledge base missing Earth.pdf and Jupiter.pdf.
output: A QueryResponse with success=False, result set to FALLBACK_RESPONSE, error message indicating missing documents, and tips.
success_criteria: error contains indication of missing documents
tips suggests ensuring documents are present
